Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: A new contact has been detected. Note: because this is a tutorial, this contact has been revealed to us through artificial means. In the real game, detection of contacts relies on the contact's actual detectability by our sensor platforms!
Let's now discuss how we will further identify and then prosecute this contact.

Now that a new contact has been detected, let's move back to JDS Hiei and discuss use of helicopters for hunting submarines. Use the Formation Manager to select JDS Hiei, or click the MMB from JDS Kikuzuki to return to JDS Hiei.
